name: Easy Cabbage and Beef Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove 10 outer leaves of cabbage.
2. Cover the leaves with boiling water; cover and let stand for 10 minutes. Drain well.
3. Combine 1/2 cup tomato sauce and the next 7 ingredients, mixing well.
4. Place 1/2 cup meat mixture in the center of each cabbage leaf.
5. Fold 2 opposite ends over, and place rolls, seam side down, in a lightly greased 8-inch baking dish.
6. Combine remaining tomato sauce, sugar, and lemon juice; pour over cabbage rolls. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour.
7. Remove cabbage rolls to a serving platter; drain tomato sauce mixture into a saucepan.
8. Combine cornstarch and water, stirring until smooth. Stir into tomato sauce mixture. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
9. Boil 1 minute. Pour over cabbage rolls.
